title: PS-68718: Fix APIM URL format for no-context-ID help links
body:
APIM URL for no-context-ID help links.

- APIM uses urn:contentId:{ID}:projectsight:projectsight with an ID, but urn:contentId::projectsight without (no version segment).
- Old code blanked the ID in the same template, producing ::projectsight:projectsight — a broken redirect.
- Added BuildOnlineHelpLandingUrl for emails and help button fallback.
author: sevilbk-trimble

reviews.body:
## Pull request overview

Fixes the APIM online help redirect format when no context/topic ID is available by introducing a dedicated “landing page” URL (no version segment) and updating both UI and email/help-link generation to use it.

**Changes:**
- Added `HelpFileProvider.BuildOnlineHelpLandingUrl(...)` and unit tests covering suffix/locale behavior.
- Plumbed `OnlineHelpLandingUrl` through backend `ContextSettings` (API + legacy window variables) into the Angular model.
- Updated help-link open logic (legacy JS + Angular) and email report help link generation to prefer the landing URL when no topic ID is present.

### Reviewed changes

Copilot reviewed 9 out of 9 changed files in this pull request and generated 2 comments.

<details>
<summary>Show a summary per file</summary>

| File | Description |
| ---- | ----------- |
| Core/Web Layer/WebUI/scripts/CTICommon.js | Uses landing URL when `topicId` is missing/0 to avoid broken APIM URN format. |
| Core/Web Layer/WebUI/ps-ng/src/app/shared/services/CurrentContextService.ts | Mirrors the same landing-URL fallback behavior for Angular help navigation. |
| Core/Web Layer/WebUI/ps-ng/src/app/shared/classes/Settings/ContextSettings.ts | Adds `OnlineHelpLandingUrl` to the client settings model and window-var init. |
| Core/Web Layer/WebUI/modules/pagebase.cs | Emits `m_OnlineHelpLandingUrl` window variable for legacy/embedded module scenarios. |
| Core/Tests/ProjectSight.Tests.UnitTests/Common/Components/Nomenclature/HelpFileProviderOnlineHelpTests.cs | Adds test coverage for landing URL formats across account types/locales. |
| Core/ExternalExecutor/ContentCreators/C1ReportContentCreator.cs | Updates email/report “support link” to use the landing URL (no context ID). |
| Core/Common/Components/Web/ContextSettings.cs | Adds `OnlineHelpLandingUrl` to backend `ContextSettings` schema. |
| Core/Common/Components/Nomenclature/HelpFileProvider.cs | Implements `BuildOnlineHelpLandingUrl` per APIM no-context-ID format. |
| Core/Business Layer/DataAccess/PageConfigurationSystem.cs | Populates `OnlineHelpLandingUrl` in context settings returned to Angular. |
</details>
reviews.author: copilot-pull-request-reviewer[bot]

review_comments.body: `BuildOnlineHelpLandingUrl` is a new public method but its XML docs are much less complete than the adjacent `BuildOnlineHelpUrlTemplate` docs (no `<example>`, `<param>`, or `<returns>`). To keep the public API documentation consistent and self-explanatory, expand this comment block to include params/returns and (ideally) an example of the expected URN formats for Enterprise vs GO/Disrupt and for locale vs non-locale.
review_comments.author: Copilot

review_comments.body: `OnlineHelpLandingUrl` is added without any JSDoc, while the related `OnlineHelpUrl` property immediately above documents the APIM template/placeholder behavior. Add a brief comment describing that this is the APIM landing-page URL used when there is no topic/context ID so consumers know when to use each field.
review_comments.author: Copilot
